title: Add 3xMLP + Mixed Quant + Blockade/Sigma submission (val_bpb: 1.1812)
body:
## Summary

- 3x MLP expansion with blockade attention diversity and uncertainty-gated residuals. 
- Mixed quantization (INT8 attention + INT6 MLP) fits wider MLP under 16MB (15.37 MB). 
- Trained on 8xH100 PCIe, 7441 steps in 10 min.
- val_bpb: 1.1812 (mixed roundtrip)

## Details
See records/track_10min_16mb/2026-03-19_3xMLP_MixedQuant_BlockadeSigma/README.md

Garret Sutherland, MirrorEthic LLC
